title: Route Stage 09 Public Package Wave
scientificQuestion: Can Sovryn route safe scientific and technical targets to useful minimum-evidence paths faster than a manually designed per-domain workflow, without making unsupported acceleration or discovery claims?
limitations: The routing run uses bounded public-safe target descriptors and Product route artifacts, not a broad outside deployment.
No broad acceleration claim is made.
No outside uptake, outside confirmation, prize-significance, or discovery-validation claim is made.
Some evidence routes are minimum useful evidence routes, not full deep validations.
Route policy still needs harder external workload pilots before scaling claims.
disclaimer: Bounded cross-domain routing result. It does not claim outside confirmation, broad acceleration, prize significance, broad autonomous intelligence, medical or legal authority, hazardous capability, or universal validity.
